title: The Enigmatic Colors of Lake Hillier

scenes.text: This lake is a vibrant bubblegum pink, and it defies all logic.
This is Lake Hillier, located on Middle Island in Western Australia.
The lake's distinct color comes from algae that produce a red pigment.
Even bottled, this water retains its striking hue.
scenes.label: STAYS STRIKING

scenes.text: Follow if you love to travel from your screen.

description: 📍 Lake Hillier, Middle Island - Western Australia. A naturally bubblegum-pink lake whose color holds true even in a bottle. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
